From Keyword to
Ranking Website

Enter a niche. AI analyzes competitors, builds an SEO strategy, generates programmatic pages, and deploys your site. No code. No lock-in.

Start Building Free 3,200 GitHub Stars 
$ python seo_engine.py plan "best hiking boots" --type ecommerce

Analyzing competitors... 20 sites crawled
Generating SEO strategy... 69 keywords, 3 topic clusters

Site ready: hikinggearpro.com (500 pages, deployed)

Built with

Python Astro FastAPI Real-time SEO data Cloudflare Stripe
The Problem

AI website builders make pretty sites.
They don't make sites that rank.

Every tool solves half the problem. We solve the whole thing.

A

AI Builders

Durable, 10Web, Wix AI generate pages in 30 seconds. But zero SEO intelligence — no keywords, no strategy, no rankings.

Pretty but invisible
B

SEO Tools

Byword, Surfer, Frase do great content research and writing. But they can't build a website. You still need to code, host, and deploy.

Content without a home
C

App Builders

Base44, Lovable, Bolt.new build apps from prompts. Not designed for SEO content sites. No keyword research, no schema, no sitemaps.

Wrong tool for SEO
How It Works

One keyword. 5 minutes.

A complete, deployed, SEO-optimized website.

1

Enter a Niche

"Best hiking boots", "London dentist", "Scottish Highlands travel" — any niche, any language.

2

AI Analyzes the Market

Crawls top 20 competitors. Extracts URL structure, schema, content depth, and keyword gaps.

3

Strategy Generated

Topic clusters, 6-month content calendar, programmatic SEO templates with real search volume data.

4

Site Built + Deployed

Astro site with Schema, llms.txt, and 50-5000 pages. One click to your VPS or Cloudflare.

Features

Everything you need to
rank and scale

🔍 Competitor Teardown Engine

Automatically crawls and analyzes competitors — URL structure, schema markup, content depth, internal linking, and keyword strategy. Then builds a better version.

⚡ Programmatic SEO at Scale

One keyword becomes thousands of pages. City landing pages, product comparisons, FAQ sections — generated from templates + structured data with content variation.

🌐 SEO-First Architecture

Every page is built for ranking: clean URLs, proper heading hierarchy, Schema.org structured data, llms.txt for AI search engines, and automatic internal linking.

🚀 Bring Your Own VPS

No platform lock-in. Deploy to your $5/month VPS via SSH. Or use Vercel, Netlify, Cloudflare. Your code, your server, your data. Always.

🤖 GEO + AI Search Built-In

Optimized for ChatGPT, Perplexity, Gemini, and Google AI Overviews. Auto-generated llms.txt, structured data for AI citation, and AI visibility tracking.

💻 100% Open Source

All modules MIT licensed. No vendor lock-in. The cloud version adds real SEO data, agent orchestration, and autonomous rank monitoring.
